items.name: browser-detector
items.title: Browser Detector
items.description: Animated widget that identifies the real browser behind a spoofed/shared User-Agent using live signals.

items.name: install-duo
items.title: Install Duo
items.description: Two live-detected install buttons: one for the visitor's browser, one for the mainstream browser of its engine (e.g. Zen → Firefox). Shows a button only when a link is provided.
